other_findings: ASDC is listed as one of the broad immune cell lineages in the prenatal skin atlas UMAP (Fig. 1e)
The atlas does not discuss ASDC biology in detail in the main text; it is identified as part of the immune compartment annotation
ASDC is present in prenatal skin alongside DC1, DC2, LC, pDC, macrophage subsets, and lymphoid populations
evidence_quotes: ASDC, Axl+Siglec6+ dendritic cells; DC, dendritic cells; HSC, haematopoietic stem cells; LC, Langerhans cells; LE, lymphatic endothelium; LTi, lymphoid tissue inducer cell; MEMP, megakaryocyte-erythroid-mast cell progenitor; NK cell, natural killer cells; pDC, plasmacytoid dendritic cells.
